title: Complete Guide to Making E-Commerce Short Videos with Free AI Tools
excerpt: From AI scripts to voiceover to editing — all free
content:
The biggest change in Taobao's 2026 search algorithm is short video weight increasing from 20% to over 30%. Products with videos have significantly higher click-through rates than those without, with conversion rates averaging over 35% higher — especially noticeable in clothing, beauty, and home categories. Previously, making product videos required hiring a photographer, renting a studio, and finding a model — budgets starting at 2,000-3,000 yuan. Now AI tools enable a single person with zero experience to mass-produce e-commerce short videos. I've been using AI to make short videos for six months, going from knowing nothing to consistently producing 10-15 finished videos per day. Below I'll share the complete workflow to help you avoid detours and get started quickly.

The first step in the entire workflow is writing scripts — and it's also the most critical. Have ChatGPT write scripts following the standard product showcase video structure: first 3 seconds with close-up shots to grab attention, middle 5 seconds for feature showcase explaining core selling points, next 5 seconds for scenario display letting buyers imagine using the product, and last 2 seconds for a call-to-action urging purchase. A complete script is generated in under a minute, ready to copy directly into Jianying. For voiceover, use Jianying's text-to-speech feature. I most commonly use the male narrator voice at 1.2x speed — clear and crisp without dragging. For clothing categories, use a gentle female voice; for sports and outdoor products, use an energetic male voice; for children's products, use a cute child's voice. Voice selection directly affects how buyers perceive the product. Choosing the right voice noticeably improves completion rates — a detail many sellers overlook but makes a significant difference.

In the editing phase, Jianying's one-click video creation is a true efficiency tool. Import your product video footage, select the product recommendation template, and AI automatically matches subtitles, music, and transition effects. Subtitle recognition accuracy is over 95%, mostly requiring no manual correction. A finished 15-30 second video ready in under 5 minutes — incredibly efficient. No product video footage? No problem. Use Canva's AI video generator with static images combined with Jianying transition animations to create demonstration videos with good results. Jianying's photo-to-video feature lets you upload several photos with a text script, and AI automatically assembles them into a dynamic video. The first 3 seconds should have visual impact. Subtitles should be prominent since many people watch without sound. End the video by guiding purchases. Match music selection with scene transition frequency — Jianying's beat-matching feature automatically identifies music rhythm for professional-looking cuts without manual timeline work.

For mass production, I spend 30 minutes each morning having ChatGPT batch-generate 10-15 video scripts for different products, import them into Jianying, and produce them using templates. Store commonly used product素材 in categorized folders for quick access. One person producing 10-15 short videos per day is entirely achievable. Don't pursue perfection — just make videos first and optimize later. Many sellers insist videos must look like professional ads before listing them, resulting in months of no output and missed traffic opportunities. Mobile phone footage processed through AI editing is already good enough. The ideal duration is 15-30 seconds — beyond that, watch rates drop off a cliff. Many sellers prefer making videos over a minute thinking more detail is better, but buyer attention is very limited. 15 seconds is enough to convey core selling points. I've tested this: videos over 30 seconds actually had lower conversion rates than 15-second videos, proving that short and impactful beats content-rich but lengthy.

The most important thing about e-commerce short videos is getting started, not waiting until conditions are perfect. Consumers want to see real product demonstrations, not perfect ads. Phone-shot scenes in a living room feel more authentic and buyers find them more convincing. AI tools have already solved the hardest parts — scripts, voiceover, editing. All you need to do is pick up your phone and start filming. Open Jianying's one-click creation today, grab your best-selling product, and make one test video. While other sellers are still hesitating, your product detail page will already have a video — that's your biggest competitive advantage. Act now. Even making just one is a great start. Don't wait.

When other sellers are still deciding whether to make short videos, you'll already have a mature, stable production workflow. That's your greatest competitive advantage. Start now — don't wait until the peak season to scramble.
